PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT DISTINCT (YEAR(?date) AS ?year)
WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P1346 wd:Q157376 .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1971)
}
ORDER BY ?date
